description: UM982 lap 3 vs RaceBox same-session window. The two lap JSONs were baked by different pipelines but BOTH target the consensus AI-line frame; the only transform applied at runtime is whatever each file individually needs to land in that frame. Whatever positional difference remains between the two cars at any moment is the raw UM-vs-RaceBox GPS sensor disagreement on the same physical drive.
_doc_hide_delta: Suppresses the floating per-frame time-delta badge above the cars and the lap-delta chart in the data panel. On this route the cars are the SAME drive recorded by two devices, not two different drivers — a time delta isn't meaningful, only the spatial GPS disagreement is.

laps.label: UM982 2952670682 Lap 3
laps._doc_consensus_delta: Same delta /video uses on the same lap JSON. Brings UM982 production-baked positions into the consensus AI-line frame. The racebox lap below does NOT carry a delta because its v4 bake already targets the same frame.
